caption: The video features a man playing the piano in a well-equipped music studio. He is seated at a keyboard, with various musical instruments such as a guitar and a trombone visible in the background. The man, dressed in a blue shirt, appears focused as he plays. The video includes an inset showing a close-up of his hands on the piano keys, highlighting the specific notes being played. Musical notations and chord names like "C7(no3)" are displayed on the screen, suggesting that this might be an instructional video aimed at teaching piano techniques or music theory. The overall setting is professional, with a microphone positioned in front of him, indicating that the session might also involve recording or live streaming.
